class.name: Trail3D
class.brief_description: A Line3D that automatically adds points to create a trail effect.
class.description:
A Line3D that automatically adds points to create a trail effect.
Points are added at the position of the Trail3D node every frame, and old points are removed after a certain lifetime. The result is a trail that follows the node as it moves through 3D space.
To use, simply add a Trail3D node to your scene and set its properties as desired. You can also customize the appearance of the trail by changing the material and width of the Line3D.

members.member: Enable or disable emission of new points.
Time in seconds before a point is removed. Set to 0 to disable point removal.
Minimum distance between points. If the distance between the last point and the new point is less than this value, the new point is not added.
